headline: High-Speed, Reliable Internet from Xfinity Coming to Nassau County, Florida
summary: NASSAU COUNTY, Fla., May 04, 2026--Comcast announced today a major milestone in the company’s commitment to expand connectivity in rural northeast Florida. More than 400 previously unserved homes and businesses in Nassau County now have access to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network.

headline: CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026: The league has its first $1 billion team
summary: The average value of a Women's National Basketball Association team is $460 million, according to CNBC's Official WNBA Team Valuations 2026.
